nasb.text: So Solomon went from the high place which was at Gibeon, from the tent of meeting, to Jerusalem, and he reigned over Israel.

esv.text: So Solomon came from the high place at Gibeon, from before the tent of meeting, to Jerusalem. And he reigned over Israel.

cnv.text: 於是，所羅門從基遍高地的會幕回到耶路撒冷，統治以色列。

ccb.text: 于是，所罗门从基遍丘坛的会幕前回到耶路撒冷治理以色列。
